title: Korak 22

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: When called with catalog[0], the returned string should contain "From a Buick 8".
When called with catalog[0], the returned string should contain "King, Stephen".
When called with catalog[0], the returned string should contain the year 2002.
When called with catalog[0], the returned string should contain "Shelf K7".
The returned string should include a top and bottom border using "-".repeat(25).

description:
Sada popunite renderEntry. Deklarišite rezervnu konstantu za svako polje: const title = entry.title || "Unknown", i primenite isti obrazac za author, year i location.

Vratite višelinijski template literal koji formatira unos kao bibliotečki karton. Koristite "-".repeat(25) za gornju i donju granicu, i uključite označene linije za Title, Author, Year i Location. Na primer, označena linija za naslov izgledala bi kao Title: ${title}.
